summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Kuryos multi-tenant SaaS system. Backend APIs are 100% functional, frontend works well with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay intercepts pointer events when clicking cards to open side-sheet
ui_bugs.details: DialogOverlay with class 'fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/80' blocks card clicks after creating new leads

design_issues.issue: Dashboard stat cards not displaying with proper data-testid selectors

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with admin@kuryos.com returns user data with cookies
POST /api/auth/register creates new tenant and seeds pipeline
GET /api/pipelines/{id}/board returns full board with 6 stages
PUT /api/cards/{id}/move moves card to different stage
GET /api/cards/{id}/details returns card with fields, products, history
Frontend login page renders with Entrar/Criar Conta tabs
Frontend login with admin@kuryos.com redirects to dashboard
Frontend dashboard shows charts and metrics
Frontend pipeline page shows Kanban board with 6 stages
Frontend 'Novo Lead' dialog opens and creates leads
Frontend sidebar navigation works (Dashboard, Pipeline, Tarefas)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dialog overlay issue in CardSheet component that prevents clicking on cards to open side-sheet. The DialogOverlay is intercepting pointer events after lead creation.
